_note: harness governance hooks — call the global `harness` CLI (guarded: silent if absent). Mirrors `harness install-hooks` (modules/setup.ts hookSpec). The CLI lives at ~/.harness/cli with ~/.local/bin/harness on PATH.

hooks.command: command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" harness pre bash || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" harness pre write || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness pre askq || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness post edit "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness commons inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness claudemd inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness recommend inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness prefs inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness easy inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness commons inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness recommend inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness architecture inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness worktree gc || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness handoff inject || true
command -v harness >/dev/null 2>&1 && harness ing inject || true
